ddls:
CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who placed the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the order was placed */,
  "purchase_address" TEXT /* Address where the order should be delivered */,
  "total_purchases" TEXT /* Total price of the order */,
  "order_status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., paid, pending, failed) */,
  "shipping_method" TEXT /* Shipping method chosen by the customer (e.g., standard, express) */,
  "coupon_code" TEXT /* Coupon code used during the order */,
  "tax_amount" TEXT /* Tax amount for the order */,
  "shipping_cost" TEXT /* Shipping cost for the order */,
  "customer_notes" TEXT /* Any notes or special instructions from the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Default shipping address */,
  "billing_address" TEXT /* Default billing address */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number for contact */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "loyalty_points" INTEGER /* Loyalty points accumulated by the customer */,
  "customer_since" TEXT /* Date when the customer first made a purchase */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the product */,
  "inventory_count" INTEGER /* Current inventory count */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category the product belongs to */,
  "vendor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vendor supplying the product */,
  "product_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  "product_image" TEXT /* URL or path to the product image */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Weight of the product for shipping calculations */,
  "dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions (length, width, height) of the product for shipping calculations */,
  "sku" TEXT /* Stock Keeping Unit (SKU) of the product */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the product is currently active and available for purchase */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_vendor_id FOREIGN KEY ("vendor_id") REFERENCES vendors ("vendor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent category */,
  "category_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_details" (
  "order_detail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order detail */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  "price_each" TEXT /* Price of each unit of the product */,
  "discount_amount" TEXT /* Discount amount applied to the product */,
  "tax_amount" TEXT /* Tax amount for the product */,
  "shipping_cost" TEXT /* Shipping cost for the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_detail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_details_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_details_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipping" (
  "shipping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipping record */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order being shipped */,
  "ship_date" TEXT /* Date when the order was shipped */,
  "delivery_date" TEXT /* Estimated delivery date */,
  "carrier" TEXT /* Shipping carrier */,
  "tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number for the shipment */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Specific shipping address for the order */,
  "shipping_method" TEXT /* Shipping method chosen by the customer */,
  "insurance" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the order is insured */,
  "signature_required" INTEGER /* Indicates whether a signature is required upon delivery */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shipping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipping_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the payment was made */,
  "payment_amount" TEXT /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment */,
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* Transaction ID from the payment gateway */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., completed, pending, failed) */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the payment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "returns" (
  "return_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each return */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order being returned */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date when the order was returned */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the return */,
  "refund_amount" TEXT /* Amount refunded */,
  "return_method" TEXT /* Method by which the return was made (e.g., mail, in-store) */,
  "return_status" TEXT /* Status of the return (e.g., received, processed, refunded) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("return_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_returns_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product being reviewed */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who wrote the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the customer */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment by the customer */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the review was written */,
  "review_title" TEXT /* Title of the review */,
  "helpful_votes" INTEGER /* Number of helpful votes the review has received */,
  "unhelpful_votes" INTEGER /* Number of unhelpful votes the review has received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "promotions" (
  "promotion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each promotion */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product the promotion applies to */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the promotion */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the promotion */,
  "discount_percentage" INTEGER /* Percentage discount offered */,
  "promotion_name" TEXT /* Name of the promotion */,
  "promotion_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the promotion */,
  "minimum_spend" TEXT /* Minimum amount the customer must spend to qualify for the promotion */,
  "maximum_discount" TEXT /* Maximum discount amount */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("promotion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_promotions_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product */,
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the warehouse */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in the warehouse */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Reorder level for the product */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the inventory was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_warehouse_id FOREIGN KEY ("warehouse_id") REFERENCES warehouses ("warehouse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "warehouses" (
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each warehouse */,
  "warehouse_name" TEXT /* Name of the warehouse */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the warehouse */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person for the warehouse */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number for the warehouse */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address for the warehouse */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("warehouse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vendors" (
  "vendor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vendor */,
  "vendor_name" TEXT /* Name of the vendor */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address for contacting the vendor */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number for contacting the vendor */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the vendor */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the vendor */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the vendor */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the vendor */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the vendor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vendor_id")
)
